'''Barksy''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Swoop/Legends|Swoop]] bike gang member on [[Pembric II]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
He was one of several gang members who tried to dissuade [[Talon Karrde]] from entering the [[ThrusterBurn Tapcafe]], only to have their bikes wrecked by [[Shada D'ukal]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
